bikes.description: It is a 54cm 2005-2010 Giant OCR road bike with Origin 8 wheels and gray camouflage handlebar tape. There is a "Pedal Power Bike Shop" label on the down tube (highlighted yellow on the attached image) and a Cateye bike computer set up on the right side (highlighted red on the attached image). There are some small circular dents in the paint of the top tube as well.
bikes.title: 2005 Giant OCR

bikes.description:
The handlebar grip is partially ripped on the left hand side. 
I had a rack installed on the back and night lights installed on the wheels (the lights lit up as red and blue; the thief took the ones off my front wheel too) 
There is a red bike light installed at the rear of the bike.
bikes.frame_model: Vilano Aluminum Road Bike 21 Speed Shimano
bikes.title: Vilano Vilano Aluminum Road Bike 21 Speed Sh...

bikes.description: Super cute 80s road bike-Miyata 912. Black with pink headtube and accents. Converted dropbars to upright riser bars, used black bar tape for grips, switched downtube shifters to stem shifters, and had a classy bell on the left side.
bikes.title: 1984 Miyata 912

bikes.description: Has several unique/distinguishing features that can be identified by owner if found.
bikes.title: 2011 Litespeed Archon C1

bikes.description:
Red Black White- Phone hodler acessory and black bell. 
Aluminum frame,carbon fork, anatomical saddle, Shimano 24-speed drivetrain and custom wheels with Formula hubs
Casette: Shimano CS-HG50-8 8-speed, 12-25T
Brakes: Tektro R-310 dual-pivot caliper
Handlebar: Fuji alloy road
Frame: A1-SL compact aluminum with traditional round down tube, double water bottle mounts, curved seat stay w/rack mount, forged road dropout with replaceable derailleur hanger;
Top tube length:510mm
Seat tube length:420mm 
Seat tube angle:76
Head tube angle:71
Head tube length:105mm
Chainstay: 420mm
Wheelbase:993mm
Shifters:Shimano ST-2303/2300
Stem:Fuji alloy, adjustable angle
Tires: Kenda K152
Wheelset: Rims: Fuji alloy with CNC sidewalls, 32-hole; Formula alloy with QR; Spokes: Stainless steel, 14GA
Front derailleur :Shimano FD-2303-B
Rear derailleur :Shimano RD-3400GS
Chain:KMC Z72
Crankset:Fuji forged alloy
bikes.title: Fuji A1 SL

bikes.description: Bright blue road bike. Black carbon fork. Red trim on the side of the tires. Holder for speedometer and headlight on the handlebar. Black wrapped handlebars.
bikes.title: 2009 Scattante Sixfifty

bikes.description: Fuji A2-SL custom butted Aluminum, Integrated 1 1/4" lower head tube, Oversized 34.9mm seat tube & PIIS BB-86 shell, Double water bottle mounts. Rear triangle: Fuji A2-SL Aluminum chain stays, Forged road dropout with replaceable derailleur hanger
bikes.title: 2011 Fuji Roubaix 1.0

bikes.description:
Red steel-frame road bike, with black grips and claris/flight deck shifters. Black steel gear rack in the rear; toe straps. 

Identifying stickers include: 
Pizza-holding Penguin Sharks Fan on top of down tube.
Triangle White/Black Design on top tube, near seat post clamp.
Black Squares on left side down tube and rear dropout.
bikes.title: 2016 KHS Bicycles Flite 223

bikes.description:
2015/2016 - Trek 8.3 DS 17.5 TRE
Bike body is black with blue decals. Most of body is covered in IT-related stickers (one big "I <heart> LINUX" sticker)
Wraparound black plastic fenders with rubber ends on both wheels
Back tire is puncture-proof with retroreflective ring.
Shocks are adjustable. 
Disk brakes.
3 gears in front. 7 in back. Clicky shifters on handlebars.
Black metal back-rack on bike with blue saddle bag on one side.
PICTURES: https://imgur.com/a/fOqBd
bikes.title: 2016 Trek Trek 8.3 DS 17.5 TRE

bikes.description: A2-SL alloy w/ tear drop down tube, double water bottle mounts. Rear triangle: A2-SL alloy, forged road dropout w/ replaceable derailleur hanger
bikes.title: 2012 Fuji Absolute 2.0

bikes.description: Raleigh hybrid bike that originally had riser bars BUT was converted into an oversized drop bar, one of a kind. It has 3x8 speeds with brand new rear crankset and bar end shifters. The color is dark green / teal, has hybrid tires, a light grey back rack, and was last accesorized with a bottle holder and a phone holder on the stem
bikes.title: Raleigh hybrid customized with drop bars

bikes.description: It had a black and red bar tapes, Shimano Clipless pedals, Continental tires, Brooks Saddle with a scratch in the right side of it.
bikes.title: 2017 MEC Provincial Road 222

bikes.description: Road bike. Grey frame with celeste (seafoam) green tubing, green handlebar tape, and green seat. Bianchi lettering has green and pink. White grips on handlebar are slightly beat up on the top (from a crash). The green seat has a hole on the left side (from a crash).  Silver track pedals.
bikes.title: Bianchi

bikes.description: Bike has straight handlebars. Ends of grips were falling off/worn out. Blue pouch containing bike wrench/spare tube/patch kit etc. was under the seat. Large silver scratch on top of left side of the handlebar. Cygolite bike light mount on right side of the handlebar.  Metal non-stock pedals were added to bike. 2012? model. Bike was black with green highlights.
bikes.title: 2012 GT Bicycles Transeo 4.0
GT Bicycles Backwoods Sport Mountain Bike

bikes.description: Road bike, white with silver and black, white and black seat, toe cages, rim brakes.
bikes.title: Giant Rapid

bikes.description: Road bike with water cage on the top of the handle bar, dropped handle bar.  Caliper breaks.  On-Guard U lock holder on main frame was repaired with clear epoxy glue, one side of bike peddles are for clip-on bike shoes.  Special ergo-correct cushioned seat.  Double padded handle bars.  Black tape on end-caps of handle bars.
bikes.title: 2014 Novara Carema 3

bikes.description:
Men’s black and white cyclocross bike - road style bike with drop handlebars (scuffed on the right side) and 35mm tyres with tread. Drossiger frame with single bottle holder, cleated pedals, silver crankset, woman’s saddle and Race Face handlebar stem (stem, saddle and crankset replaced so differ from the sales image). At least one of the plastic caps on the hoods of the handlebars is missing. When it was stolen, it had a black saddlebag of tools and pump clipped to it as well as a red and white tag below the seat post for Sanctuary Students University Accomodation in Dundee. 
I’ve had this bike since I was fourteen. It has significant sentimental value and is possibly the worst material thing someone could have stolen from me. It’s taken me from John O’ Groats to Land’s End, from the top of Shetland to the Mull of Galloway and the length of the Irish West Coast and we weren’t done yet.
bikes.title: Drossiger CXA2.1 cyclocross

bikes.description:
Brand New 2017 Giant Roam 2 Men Large bike  k47023216 Sliver with orange details
(Brand New 2017 Giant Roam 2 Mens M bike stolen as well k47028404) Silver with orange details
bikes.title: 2017 Giant 70053315

bikes.description: Silver Giant Roam 2 with orange details a padded saddle and SPZ-overenz & Bar Ends
bikes.title: 2017 Giant 70053315

bikes.description:
a completely custom built single speed road bike, not technically fancy, but actually quite fancy. 
the two most unique things were an ideale type record 80 saddle that is quite worn, and actually custom punched and laced underneath, just above the rails. the second thing are the custom built cherry wood fenders. they are made locally by paul sykes and says "sykes" on the rear fender. they have leather arrow tip shaped mud flaps, and are only wide enough to accommodate up to 700c x 25 tires. 
the frame was unpainted and unfinished with a clear sealant. 
the wheel set is a black deep v origin8 single speed set with machined side walls.
the freewheel is white industries eno, 17 tooth if i remember correctly. 
the handlebars are soma condorina bars that look like cafe racer motorcycle bars. 
the grips are worn leather PDW (portland design works.
mountain style tektro break levers. 
the tires are red-walled continental vintage/classic or whatever term they used. 
there are black power grips on the pedals. 
there was a black minihaha brand saddle bag on the back of the saddle. 
black seatpost.  
black cable housing. 
black pedals. 
silver crank, silver origin8 48 tooth cog, i believe. 
the serial number will be under the bottom bracket, but i misplaced any pictures i'd previously taken of it.
bikes.title: Fuji

bikes.description: Single Speed Road bike. Size XXS at 43cm. Frame color is Gloss Cream and both wheels are wide with Mint Green color, white handle bars and white seat. Tires are both made by Kenda.
bikes.title: Pure Cycles X-ray

bikes.description: The bike is a gray/black road bike that is a 7 speed that has a 43-46 in. Frame. non-adjustable stem and standard handles. Pedals are extremely thin. Bike is in new condition, about a month old.
bikes.title: 2017 Retrospec Mantra 7

bikes.description:
My bike is a Specialized Vita Step Through matte black with hot pink trim.  The handle grips are black rubber with pink end tips. It has a black bell on the right, with a bold white sticker on top that says "I heart my bike". On the right hand side, it has "2013" written on the bar in silver marker. On the left, there is a PDW Coffee Cup Holder. The bike has a brand new Zefal front fender that was purchased the day before it was stole, along with a black seat lock, to a Milano Gel Saddle in Black. It has Shimano silver Sport/Traininig Road pedals, black kick stand, with a Topeak rack in the back. There is also a black Green Guru top tube rubber protector. Lastly, there is a "Bicycle Habitat - Soho, 250 Lafayette Street
New York, NY 10012" black/rainbow trim sticker on the base of the bike.

Many thank you's in advance.
bikes.title: 2012 Specialized Vita Step-Through

bikes.description: Women's with the seat all the way down. Similar to mountain bike, more like a crossover, not road tires. 19 or 20" tires, 18 speed. Had a speedometer/odometer and it had black handlebars.
bikes.title: Trek

bikes.description: Women's Specialized hybrid bike in charcoal grey with "Specialized" written in white on the side. Smooth black upturned bullhorn handlebars were added to the model for easier riding (original model only comes with the flat ergonomic grip handles). 27-speed Shimano Alivio shifters and skinny Specialized All Condition Armadillo Elite tires. Aluminum Linear-pull brakes and a small lightweight Specialized Body Geometry Riva Road bike seat. Very lightweight and easy to ride. A Giro brand helmet was stolen along with it. It also had a speedometer and a circular mirror on the left handlebar and the (black) base to a cable lock still attached below the seat. It was a prize bike from McClain Cycle and Fitness in Traverse City MI, USA from the 2011 Cherry Roubaix.
bikes.title: 2011 Specialized Vita Comp EN 14764

bikes.frame_model: Absolute 2.3 Flat Bar Women's Road Bike
bikes.title: 2017 Fuji Absolute 2.3 Flat Bar Women's Road Bike

bikes.description: Alpha SLR Aluminum. Note that the bike seat has been replaced since photo was taken - seat is white. Bike also has only one water bottle holder and a rear caddy. Also has pinhead locking skewers in place for front and rear wheels, seat lock and headset lock.
bikes.title: 2005 Trek 1500

bikes.description: The road bike is a dark green frame with orange accents. It has a large black side bag.
bikes.title: 2017 Access Turnpike

bikes.description: Has dent near the front of the bike on the top tube has standard drop outs and is top loaded clamp action brakes had a blue and black front rim a redline rear rim Tioga power block tires front is 2.10 back is 1.75 has Amber bmx stem has redline proline crank arms and 44t gt sprocket along with sealed bottom bracket berings nine and a half inch raise bars new oddesey grips and had stickers on the bottom left and right rear part of the frame two on the forks one on the very front of the bike on top right behind the top tube it was square and said rock shocks the others said ride to live live to ride the one on the forks where big and round and looked like they had water drops there was an I love chico on the bottom right side of the frame in the back and there is a sticker below the seat post down near the bottom of the bike right above the bottom bracket that was an American flag and said 4130 chromoly on it and mettle peddles seat said velo also has a gt seat post with Allen wrench bolt to tighten it to the rails of the seat
bikes.title: 2001 GT Bicycles gt crusier pro series bmx

bikes.description: My first real bike, bought back in 1986.  Outfitted with touring racks, front and rear.  Dual Shimano pedals, SPD one side, flat the other.  Picture shows similar frame only - not my bike, mine had front and rear racks for panniers and was a 10-speed with end bar shifters.  Not super valuable but sentimental...
bikes.title: SR (SR Pro) Road bike frame from 80s - steel

bikes.description: Fuji Altair 2 custom butted aluminum with PowerDiamond down tube, Integrated head tube, Double water bottle mounts. Rear triangle: Fuji carbon seat stays, Fuji Altair 2 aluminum chain stays, Fuji forged road dropout with replaceable derailleur hanger.
bikes.title: 2007 Fuji Roubaix

bikes.description:
It doesn't have the blue stripe that the Detour 1 has on the frame(it's just solid black with Raleigh on the side of the frame). It also has a rack added on to the back for carrying bags. 

The frame and wheels have some white road paint stuck on them from when I road it through wet road paint.
bikes.title: Raleigh Detour 1

bikes.description:
Tall and running the fixed hub.
Bars are fully wrapped instead of partial wrap seen in picture.
bikes.title: 2008 Specialized langster london

bikes.description: A2-SL compact double-butted alloy w/ hydroformed top tube & down tube, integrated head tube, double water bottle mounts. Rear triangle: A2-SL alloy tapered seatstays/chainstays w/ rack mount, forged-road dropout w/ 1 eyelet and replaceable derailleur hanger
bikes.title: 2013 Fuji Sportif 1.3 C

bikes.description:
Fuji A6-SL custom-butted alloy, integrated 1 1/2" lower head tube, oversized 34.9mm seat tube & PIIS BB86 shell, double water bottle mounts. Rear triangle: Fuji A6-SL alloy chainstays, forged-road dropout w/ replaceable derailleur hanger.
Saddle upgraded to Selle Italia Gel.
bikes.title: 2014 Fuji Roubaix 1.5

bikes.description:
The frame and all accessories are a very dark gray. Trek calls the color "Cosmic Black." There are a few very small blue accents on the frame in a few places. Shifters are light gray colored, with two levers on each for up / down shifting, and 24 speeds. It also has a front suspension fork with pre-load adjustment. There is a Bontrager rear rack attached. This model is shown (without a rear rack) in the Trek archive at 

http://archive.trekbikes.com/us/en/2015/Trek/verve_3
bikes.title: 2015 Trek Verve 3

bikes.description: This bike was my father's. He got it back in the 80s and just gave it to me a few weeks ago. I don't know the make but it is dark green road bike with forward facing handle bars, gear shifts are located on the frame and there is a rack on the back that has "Blackburn" etched into it.
bikes.title: 1980 Unknown

bikes.description: Fuji fixed wheel track SE (approx 2008). Imported from the UK, looks identical to pic shown in terms of colour but has a front brake fitting for road use. Brake lever is on left hand side of the handlebars
bikes.title: 2008 Fuji Track SE

bikes.description:
200 Series Alpha Aluminum, IsoSpeed.
White frame with black writing and orange seat/handlebars.
SPD A530 Pedals (new since photos)
bikes.title: 2014 Trek Domane 2.0 (Compact or Triple)

bikes.description: Gold Series Aluminum
bikes.title: 2011 Trek Bodega

bikes.description: 2002 Lemond Nevada City road bike, Reynolds 853 Steel, Grey/blue color (mainly gray), 58/59cm (sticker still on frame), 8spd Sora components, triple chain ring with center derailleur spring broken so I locked it into the middle chain ring, Village Cycle Sport sticker at far bottom base of seat tube, 32 spoke Aurora Matrix wheels with IRC tires (700x25mm and very worn looking, rear has some green paint specs on sidewall), very long 60mm “gold” front tire valve (rear valve dull gray short 35mm and leaks as soon as it is opened), comfort saddle, large rear tail light, no light on front only silver/white reflector, cycle computer mount but no computer (very sharp edges), two silver bottle cages, old style aluminum LOOK pedals (right side pedal is black with red float adjuster (set to zero), left side one blue no float adjuster), seat tube has a small piece of black electric tape to remember seat height for  a 2nd rider. Rear brake is open because the rear wheel is badly out of true. “Greg Lemond” signature on top tube. Handle bar stem angled up (not horizontal) with silver end cap, black handle bar tape was messed-up on the left side. Front wheel with silver wheel magnet on outward spoke and black speed sensor on right side of fork blade.
bikes.title: 2002 LeMond Racing Cycles Nevada City
